topic: Clothes in my exact size that I never bought keep appearing in my closet.
title: The Clothes I Never Bought | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There were shirts in my closet I had never bought.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a row of hanging shirts in a dim bedroom closet, low light, deep shadow between the hangers, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I rent a small apartment alone, third floor, no roommates.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a quiet small apartment hallway at dusk, dim light through a single window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every morning I dress in the same gray routine.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a closet rail with folded gray clothing on a shelf, soft morning shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning a navy coat hung where nothing had been.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a single dark navy coat hanging alone on a closet rail, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It fit me perfectly. That was the wrong part.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an empty coat sleeve hanging, faint dust motes in a thin beam of light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The tag was cut. Inside, my own name in pen.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of hands holding a coat collar where a cloth tag has been cut away, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I emptied the closet and counted everything I owned.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of clothes piled on a bed beside an emptied open closet, low evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By dawn another piece had appeared, again my exact size.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a new folded sweater resting on a closet shelf, pale dawn light across it, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Soon the rail was full of a stranger's careful taste.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a densely packed closet rail of varied coats and shirts, deep shadow at the back, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Behind the last hanger, the wall had a small worn door.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a low half height door revealed at the back of a closet behind clothes, darkness beyond, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I moved out that week and told no one why.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of cardboard moving boxes stacked in an empty bedroom at night, single bare bulb, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every shirt smelled faintly of someone who lived here first.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a folded shirt held to the light, faint fabric texture, dim lamp glow, vertical 9:16 framing
